name: Advance America
description_short: Orlando, FL's Advance America at 4473 S Semoran Blvd offers fast payday and title loans.
description_long:
Advance America's Orlando, FL branch sits at 4473 S Semoran Blvd, a convenient standalone storefront in the south Orlando area. This location serves the local community with straightforward access and visible signage. Hours are Monday through Thursday 10AM–6PM, Friday 9AM–6PM, Saturday 9AM–4PM, and closed Sunday.

This Orlando location offers payday loans, title loans, check cashing, and other short-term credit solutions. Customers can apply in person or call 407-207-2630 to discuss loan options, required documentation, and funding timelines. The staff can explain eligibility criteria and help you understand the terms before you borrow.

Residents of Orlando, FL who need emergency cash or a title loan can visit this Semoran Boulevard location with a valid government ID and proof of income. If you're facing an unexpected expense or short-term cash gap, this storefront offers same-day or next-business-day funding options. Advance America specializes in fast, accessible lending for Orlando residents with limited traditional credit options.

pricing.guarantee_details: No money-back guarantee advertised or verified for any loan product.

tiers.name: Payday Loans
features: Borrow up to $1,000 (amount varies by state)
Repaid on your next payday (2–4 weeks)

tiers.name: Installment Loans
features: Borrow up to $5,000 (amount varies by state)

tiers.name: Lines of Credit
features: Revolving credit up to a set limit
Interest charged only on the amount drawn

tiers.name: Title Loans (via LoanCenter)
features: Keep driving your vehicle during loan term

pros: One of the largest US payday lenders — 157 million+ loans served in over 25 years of operation
800+ physical store locations across 27 states for in-person service
Same-day funding available for applications approved before 10:30 AM ET
No prepayment penalties on any loan product — paying early reduces total cost
A+ rating with the Better Business Bureau
Multiple product types available: payday loans, installment loans, lines of credit, and title loans
Online application portal at advanceamerica.net for fully remote borrowing
cons: Extremely high APRs — payday loan rates range from 143.29% to 688.28% depending on state
Installment loan APRs commonly exceed 200%, far above credit unions and most online lenders
Only available in 27 states — not a nationwide option
Title loans are not offered directly — borrowers are referred to third-party partner LoanCenter
Owned by Grupo Elektra (Grupo Salinas), a Mexican conglomerate — not a community or mission-driven lender
best_for: People facing a financial emergency who need cash within hours and cannot qualify for a bank loan
Borrowers with poor or no credit history who have been rejected by traditional lenders
Individuals who prefer or require in-person service at a physical storefront
Consumers needing small amounts ($100–$1,000) quickly with no collateral
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for borrowers in genuine short-term emergencies who have no access to lower-cost credit — a bank loan, credit union PAL, or 0% intro credit card should always be explored first. The core caveat is cost: APRs between 143% and 688% make these products among the most expensive legal forms of consumer credit available, and borrowers who cannot repay on time risk a compounding debt cycle.
services: Online loan application and account management (online.advanceamerica.net)
In-store loan origination at 800+ locations across 27 states
Early repayment with no prepayment penalty

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Orlando, FL: Advance America at 4473 S Semoran Blvd. Fast payday and title loans with same-day funding.
